name: Ramawatar Mahto, Muzaffarpur
title: Free cardiac surgery gives Ramawatar a new lease of life
excerpt: A daily-wage labourer from Muzaffarpur underwent a life-saving cardiac bypass surgery worth over Rs. 2.5 lakh at a network hospital, entirely free of cost under AB-PMJAY.

name: Sunita Devi, Gaya
title: Ayushman card helps Sunita's family through a medical emergency
excerpt: When her husband met with a serious accident, Sunita used her Ayushman Card to secure immediate cashless treatment, avoiding a debt that would have taken years to repay.

name: Md. Iqbal, Purnia
title: Kidney transplant covered fully under the scheme
excerpt: Md. Iqbal, a small farmer, received a fully covered kidney transplant at an empanelled hospital in Patna, restoring his health without financial hardship for his family.
